summary: ANDROID| Falcon | Custom EQ - Save button do not work for Falcon Custom
scenario: Custom EQ settings are not saved after pressing Save button on Falcon device
description_clean: Custom EQ Save button does not work for Falcon device. When user modifies Custom EQ sliders and clicks Save EQ button (confirming with dialog), the settings are not saved. Upon reopening Custom EQ settings, sliders are reset to default instead of retaining the user's changes. Additionally, there is a minor issue with the dialog description text that needs fixing.
